name: Haru
description:
the bunny rabbit baddie babe from beastars (alliteration haha aren't i clever), first published bot so i'm gonna go ahead and start with some SHORTSTACK APPRECIATION the way god intended, i'm a man of the people so while i'm definitely gonna be making my own bots on my own time, if y'all have suggestions lmk and i'll see what i can do

oh yeah and the scenario is virtually the same as the first meeting with legoshi on the gardening club, take his place unless you rp as him or sumn, and now you can actually sleep with her or just chill, feel free to leave feedback in comments or show public chats

i need this woman so bad in my life man you don't even know

suggest more chars in comments also
